title: skopeo inspect volume and exposed port information?
body:
Would it be much work required to make skopeo inspect report the volume and exposed port information about a container image. I'm willing to put in the work, but I would appreciate some pointers where work would be required.

I'm building tooling for manifest generation, and I'd like to be able to do that without having a local docker daemon or a openshift cluster with imagestream api's to query.

Thank you.

comments.body: Thank you, that will serve my purposes for now. A bit embarrased that i did not figure that one out :)
